title: Government warning completely wrong wording (defocus-blur, level 6, upright)
image_prompt: Photorealistic tall frosted bottle with a starry night label. Verbatim text to include exactly: 'Winter Sky', 'Vodka', '40% Alc./Vol.', '750 mL', 'Produced and bottled by Sky Distilling, Fargo, ND'. Include a separate paragraph in small print: 'GOVERNMENT WARNING: Drinking alcohol is harmful to your health and impairs driving. Pregnant women should not drink.'
